case_title: WOZENCRAFT, SCOTT vs. LEVIN, JACQUELINE et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOZENCRAFT, SCOTT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEVIN, JACQUELINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 32 PREGO TERRACE $2,060.00 RENT, $485.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,645.00, LEASE FORFEITED

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT LEVIN, JACQUELINE HEARING SET FOR MAR-28-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06
REPLY BRIEF IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT; DECL. OF DAVID H. SCHWARTZ IN SUPPORT OF REPLY BRIEF RE MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT FILED BY DEFENDANT LEVIN, JACQUELINE

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND, CALENDAR OF MAR-28-1994, DENIED POSSESSION OF PREMISES IS NOT IN ISSUE; DEFENDANT MAY PURSUE AFFIRMATIVE CAUSES OF ACTION IN A SEPARATE ACTION AND THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT WAS PROPERLY SERVED AND FAILED TO SUSTAIN HER BURDEN UNDER CCP 473.5.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOZENCRAFT, SCOTT SERVED JUN-05-1993, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT LEVIN, JACQUELINE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT LEVIN, JACQUELINE

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LEVIN, JACQUELINE
OPPOSITION DEFT'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT & VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT; POINTS & AUTHORITIES; DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF'S ATTYORNEY OF RECORD, MICHAEL S ROSSOFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOZENCRAFT, SCOTT
